pages.title: Find & Use EV Chargers with the ChargePoint App | ChargePoint
pages.description: Easily find and use EV charging stations wherever life takes you with ChargePoint – Find. Charge. Pay. Go.
pages.content:
![ChargePoint charging stations map on a laptop](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/Finding-using-stations-main-banner.png)

# Finding & using stations

### Easily find and use EV charging stations   wherever life takes you with ChargePoint.

[Explore charging map](https://www.chargepoint.com/drivers-map)

Find stations

## Find. Charge. Pay. Go.

### Finding a place to charge your EV has never been easier with ChargePoint.

### ChargePoint app

Discover a place to charge from hundreds of thousands of stations with the ChargePoint app. Customize widgets to discover nearby stations on your phone without having to open the app.

[Discover the ChargePoint app](https://www.chargepoint.com/drivers/mobile)

![Hand holding a mobile phone with ChargePoint app ](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/styles/large/public/2024-02/hand-held-CP-app.png?itok=LPjI_08u)

### Car integrations

Connect your car to Apple CarPlay and Android Auto to access important information while on the road.

[Learn more about car integration](https://www.chargepoint.com/drivers/support/faqs/does-chargepoint-work-apple-carplay)

![ChargePoint app in car dash](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/styles/large/public/2023-09/Car-intergration-375x380.png?itok=kmWupX-W)

### Driver portal

Use the charging map to find the right EV charging station for you from the largest global EV charging network.

[Explore the charging map](https://www.chargepoint.com/drivers-map)

![ChargePoint drivers app on a laptop](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/styles/large/public/2023-09/Driver-portal-375x380.png?itok=R_6GM5XS)

How to charge

## Get to know our stations

### Charging at a ChargePoint or roaming partner station in the world’s largest EV charging network is easy, affordable and convenient.

![Car charging on ChargePoint CP6000](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/styles/large/public/2023-10/Get-to-know-stations-workplace-520x272.png?itok=Z0dpObbM)![Car charging at convince store using ChargePoint Express Plus](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/styles/large/public/2023-10/Get-to-know-stations-fastfood-520x272.png?itok=KQ88gne3)

![Person charging their car](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/styles/large/public/2023-10/Get-to-know-stations-780x560.png?itok=bWnCiThm)

![Find stations icon](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/styles/large/public/2023-09/Find-station-icon.png?itok=dhPt9E1_)

### Find the right station for you

Find and filter the right station near you in the app.

![Use stations icon](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/styles/large/public/2023-09/Use-station-icon.png?itok=Nl2cZ6kw)

### Drive up & plug in

Drive up, plug in and enjoy the amenities nearby.

![Pay icon](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/styles/large/public/2023-09/Pay-icon.png?itok=bwVH0pB-)

### Unplug when you’re done

Unplug when you get notified that you’re done charging.

![Orange shoe and green tree icon](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/styles/large/public/2023-09/Live-best-life-icon.png?itok=ZVCmUAqS)

### Live your best life

Go about the rest of your day. It’s that easy.

Start charging

## Start charging your way

### Start charging instantly however you choose, with many convenient ways to begin a session at your fingertips.

- ![ChargePoint Card Icon](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/2023-10/Chargepoint-card-icon.svg)

**ChargePoint card**

Tap your ChargePoint RFID card to start charging at ChargePoint or roaming partner stations.

- ![Remote Start Icon](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/2023-10/Remote-start-icon.svg)

**Remote start**

Press the “Start Charge” button in your ChargePoint app to begin charging at all ChargePoint and certain roaming partner stations.

- ![Tap to Charge Icon](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/2023-10/Tap-to-charge-icon.svg)

**Tap to Charge**

Tap your Apple or Android phone on a ChargePoint station to start charging.

- ![Smart Watch Icon](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/2023-10/Smart-watch-icon.svg)

**Smart watch**

Your Apple or Wear OS smart watch allows you to start charging with Tap to Charge using your digital wallet at any ChargePoint station.

- ![Scan QR Code Icon](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/2023-10/Scan-QR-code-icon.svg)

**Scan QR code**

Use your ChargePoint account to start charging at certain roaming stations with a QR code. Just press the “Scan QR code” button in the app, then scan the station’s QR code to begin your session.

- ![Credit Card Icon](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/2023-10/Credit-card-icon.svg)

**Credit card**

While not as convenient as using a free ChargePoint account, contactless credit cards, digital wallets and pay-by-phone will allow you to start a session without a driver account.


![ChargePoint app with app rating stars](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/styles/large/public/2024-02/driver-app-with-rating-stars_EN.png?itok=MjUpX5OY)

## Why ChargePoint

Activate your free ChargePoint account to charge, drive and live better.

- Access the world’s leading charging network with one free account
- Get 24/7 global driver support
- Find and use stations globally
- Track all your charging with one account and app
- Start charging instantly
- See real-time station availability

[Sign up](https://www.chargepoint.com/signup)

![Photo of user interacting with their phone](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/styles/large/public/2023-09/Get-the-CP-app-bkgd-image.png?itok=YxVlPrxl)![Screen ChargePoint app notifications](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/styles/large/public/2024-02/Driver-App-Notification_EN.png?itok=Kj8QUoVi)

## Get the EV charging app from ChargePoint

#### Scan the QR code to download

![Get ChargePoint App QR code](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/styles/large/public/2023-09/get-cp-app-QR-code.png?itok=2ZTRtTAU)

#### Download from app stores

[![App Store Badge](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/2023-09/App_Store_Badge_US-UK_RGB_blk_092917.svg)](https://itunes.apple.com/app/apple-store/id356866743?pt=309768&ct=Driver%20Mobile%20Web%20Page&mt=8)[![Google Play Badge](https://www.chargepoint.com/sites/default/files/2023-09/Google_Play_Store_badge_EN_0.svg)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.coulombtech&referrer=utm_source%3DDriver%2520Mobile%26utm_medium%3DWeb%2520Page)
